# A trap made of cookies
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=A%20trap%20made%20of%20cookies&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = A trap made of cookies
| desc = YACK,YACK,YACK,YACK,man down.
| slot = trap
| tier = ST
| rarity = a
| cost = 85
| damage = 490
| radius = 4
| triggerradius = 2.6
| armtime = 10
| cooldown = 0
| fameb = 5
| bonuses = {{Stat|hp|4}}{{Stat|mp|4}}{{Stat|att|4}}{{Stat|vit|4}}{{Stat|wis|4}}
| effects = yes
| dazed = 5
| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by Cookie Monster
}}
<noinclude>
{{NavTraps}}
</noinclude>
